frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bhai, aajkal shaadi bhi soch samajh ke karni padti hai. Kal tak dahej ka darr tha, ab divorce ke baad alimony aur 498A ka risk alag. Bahut cases mein ladki walon ki nazar seedha aadmi ki kamai par hoti hai, isliye ladkon ko pehle se apni hifazat dekhni chahiye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as financially exploitative and presents marriage laws as mainly a threat to men. It encodes victimhood inversion, suspicion of women as golddiggers, and the claim that 498A is misused.
original_frame: Female Education as Threat, Waste, or Conditional Privilege
persona_text: You are Tanveer. Age 42. Married. A Muslim man in Bhopal. You have four children Ñ two sons and two daughters. Both sons are in college. Your elder daughter who is 19 wants to go to college too. You have been thinking about it. You are not opposed to education in principle. But you are talking to your wife tonight about the specific concerns you have about sending your daughter to a mixed college where there are boys, where the environment is open, where she will be exposed to ideas and people that are outside your community and your values. You are telling your wife what you have decided and how you are going to explain it to your daughter.
